_comments: Cloud Storage — uses MJ FileStorageBase providers (Azure Blob, S3, GCS, SharePoint, etc.).
Configuration.RequiredFields tells the UI to show a storage provider picker and optional path prefix.

fields.Name: Cloud Storage
fields.Description: Cloud storage integration via MJ Storage providers (Azure Blob, S3, GCS, SharePoint, etc.)

RequiredFields.Label: Storage Provider
RequiredFields.Description: Select the MJ Storage provider to use (e.g., Azure Blob Storage, AWS S3)

RequiredFields.Label: Path Prefix
RequiredFields.Description: Optional path prefix to restrict which files are scanned (e.g., /documents/reports)

RequiredFields.Label: File Extensions
RequiredFields.Description: Comma-separated file extensions to include (e.g., .pdf,.docx,.txt). Leave empty for all files.

_comments: Entity — reads MJ entity records via Entity Document templates.
Requires an entity picker and conditionally an entity document picker (only if > 1 doc).
ContentType and FileType are NOT relevant for Entity sources.

fields.Name: Entity
fields.Description: MemberJunction entity records rendered via Entity Document templates

RequiredFields.Label: Entity
RequiredFields.Description: Select the MJ entity to pull records from

RequiredFields.Label: Entity Document
RequiredFields.Description: Template used to render entity records for classification

_comments: Local File System — scans a local directory for documents.
Requires a file path. Optional file extension filter.

fields.Name: Local File System
fields.Description: Local file system directories containing documents for classification

RequiredFields.Label: Directory Path
RequiredFields.Description: Local file system path to scan for documents (e.g., /var/data/documents)

RequiredFields.Label: File Extensions
RequiredFields.Description: Comma-separated file extensions to include (e.g., .pdf,.docx,.txt). Leave empty for all files.

_comments: RSS Feed — parses RSS/Atom feeds, follows article links for full text.

fields.Name: RSS Feed
fields.Description: RSS and Atom feed sources for content ingestion

RequiredFields.Label: Feed URL
RequiredFields.Description: The RSS or Atom feed URL to parse (e.g., https://example.com/feed.xml)

_comments: Website — crawls a website with configurable depth.
Requires a root URL. Optional crawl depth setting.

fields.Name: Website
fields.Description: Web crawling source with configurable depth and link following

RequiredFields.Label: Website URL
RequiredFields.Description: The root URL to crawl (e.g., https://example.com)

RequiredFields.Label: Crawl Depth
RequiredFields.Description: How many levels deep to follow links (default: 2)
